case_title: NEW FALLS CORPORATION VS. MARK BUDOVSKY et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BUDOVSKY, MARK DBA ORTHODONTIC LABORATORY, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-31-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2005
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 395(B). FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION
SUMMONS RETURNED ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION SERVED SEP-21-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUDOVSKY, MARK DBA ORTHODONTIC LABORATORY, AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BUDOVSKY, MARK DBA ORTHODONTIC LABORATORY, AN INDIVIDUAL

DECLARATION OF TERISA SLATER RE: CCP 585(A); USE OF COPIES; 1717; REQUEST FOR INTEREST & FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT BUDOVSKY, MARK DBA ORTHODONTIC LABORATORY, AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-30-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUDOVSKY, MARK DBA ORTHODONTIC LABORATORY, AN INDIVIDUAL $12,181.24 PRINCIPAL, $1,550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,126.92 INTEREST, $358.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,216.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF NEW FALLS CORPORATION
